<!-- Clear and concise description of the feature you want -->

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What is the user need? -->

<!-- Describe how you would like this feature to work -->

<!-- Show examples of how this feature would be used -->

```php
// Your example here
```

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Describe alternative approaches if any -->

<!-- Link any related issues or discussions -->

## Breaking Changes

<!-- Would this be a breaking change? -->

- [ ] Yes, this would be a breaking change
- [ ] No, this is backwards compatible

If yes, describe the impact:

## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature? -->

- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (would benefit many users)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic or minor improvement)

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other relevant information -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have considered the design and architecture impact
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's goals
